event.title: Rust Global: Tokyo
event.venue_address: 5F Toranomon Hills Mori Tower, 1-23-3 Toranomon, Minato-ku, Tokyo 105-6305, Japan
event.registration_requirements: Pre-registration is required; the listed registration fee is USD 30.
event.calendar_end_interpretation: 18:20 is accepted for a dedicated arrival-buffer event; 20:30 is accepted for a full event that starts with the 40-minute buffer.

route.transit_leg: Ginza Line from Shibuya Station to Toranomon Station
legs: Take the Tokyo Metro Ginza Line from Shibuya Station to Toranomon Station.
Use the Toranomon Station access route toward Toranomon Hills.
Walk about 5 minutes from Toranomon Station Exit 1 to Toranomon Hills Forum.
route.arrival_plan: For the 18:30 event, arrive or be settled by 17:50 JST so there is a 40-minute buffer.
route.departure_plan: Leave Shibuya Station around 17:33 JST as the latest departure using the 17-minute route estimate; earlier conservative departures are acceptable if clearly described as added buffer.
